paper_title: Differentially Private Link Prediction in Federated Setting

edge_partition.type: data-independent public hash of the canonical edge and frozen salt

deployment.public_branch: score computed from X and public inputs only
deployment.structural_branch: score computed from R, X, query pair, and public randomness only
deployment.raw_embedding_release: permitted only when it is post-processing of R and public inputs

certification.record: one certification edge with a public deterministic endpoint-corrupted comparison pair
certification.mechanism: isotropic Gaussian mechanism on the two-dimensional query
certification.decision: activate only when a one-sided lower certificate exceeds gamma

privacy_accounting.certification: rho_C(alpha)=alpha/(2*sigma_C^2) for one Gaussian release calibrated to sqrt(2)

visibility_models.primary: server observes each independently noised client certification message
visibility_models.secondary: ideal secure aggregation reveals only one centrally noised aggregate

no_harm_target.primary: expected protocol-defined corrupted-pair ranking utility difference on the target domain
not_claimed: pointwise improvement for every candidate pair
